title: Purpura
description: Purpura is one of my biggest projects to date. It is a Chrome extension that I developed to enhance and modernize the Roblox website. It was over a year in the making before it's first release, but it is incredibly stable and competes with a lot of the biggest Roblox extensions out there. It has a lot of features, and is very customizable. I am incredibly proud of this project.

title: Teutonic Labs
description: This website is a collection of web-based games that I made. It has a lot of fun web games to play that I think are relatively fun! It has a slight german theme to it with the das prefix to the game names, and a lot of the games are centered around it.

title: TerrorLink
description: TerrorLink is my first ever application project. This is a windows application for temporary-based chatting. It was made as a way to chat on games with text-chat bans or age restrictions. It is privacy focused with no account or database and has a simple 1-click hosting system. I am very proud of how this project turned out.

title: Hytale Share Code Cracker
description: HSCC is a very simple Python script to crack Hytale share codes into legible JSON since Hytale publicized their encryption method.

title: TerrorOS Discord Theme
description: TerrorOS Discord Theme is a custom theme for Discord that I created to match a more minimal terminal-like aesthetic. It is based off of the System24 theme.
